claim: A compact model or glyph can organise attention without proving the represented structure.
source_or_comparator: General modelling / scientific-method boundary; Concordance v0.3: model != measurement, compression != proof.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Keeps the boundary as an explicit operator in every artifact.
falsifier_or_demoter: Any artifact uses elegance/compression as evidence of truth.
must_not_claim: Not claiming notation validates ME/TRACE.

claim: A correction path can be formally present but functionally late.
source_or_comparator: Administrative justice, due process, system-safety postmortems; Diagnostic Kernel v0.1.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Centers timing rather than only formal availability.
falsifier_or_demoter: Cases where formal availability reliably prevents hardening without timing constraints.
must_not_claim: Not claiming every late process is malicious or illegal.

claim: The minimum useful correction question is: can correction reach the affected subject before harm hardens?
source_or_comparator: Diagnostic Kernel v0.1; Apollo/Columbia concordance layer.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Compresses timing, authority, and repair into a reusable check.
falsifier_or_demoter: If the question fails to discriminate live cases better than ordinary prose.
must_not_claim: Not claiming this is a complete ethics theory.

claim: Correction is conjunctive: witness, record, authority, time, enforcement, and repair can fail if any essential carrier is absent.
source_or_comparator: K-gate / reliability engineering / due process / cybernetics; Diagnostic Kernel v0.1.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Makes the AND-gate visible and portable.
falsifier_or_demoter: If real cases show missing factors do not materially affect correction capacity.
must_not_claim: Not claiming the exact six factors are final or exhaustive.

claim: Unknowns must not be silently converted into passes.
source_or_comparator: Risk governance, audit practice, safety engineering; Diagnostic Kernel boundary.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Treats unknown as a correction state, not a prose caveat.
falsifier_or_demoter: If treating unknown as pass improves safety without hidden harm.
must_not_claim: Not claiming every unknown requires shutdown.

claim: A pass through the Diagnostic Kernel is not a safety certification.
source_or_comparator: Kernel v0.1 boundary.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Prevents diagnostic tools becoming laundering devices.
falsifier_or_demoter: If artifacts begin using kernel pass as proof of safety/alignment.
must_not_claim: Not claiming the kernel replaces expert review.

claim: Correction-fragility increases when the actor causing or controlling harm also controls the correction trigger.
source_or_comparator: Institutional economics, administrative law, capture theory; P_trigger field.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Names correction-dependence as a practical proxy for power concentration.
falsifier_or_demoter: If actor-controlled systems routinely correct faster than independent systems under comparable stakes.
must_not_claim: Not claiming actor-control always implies bad faith.

claim: High hazard immediacy raises the importance of live correction because hardening arrives faster.
source_or_comparator: Safety engineering, product safety, emergency response; H_immediacy field.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Connects hazard speed to correction-window analysis.
falsifier_or_demoter: If slow correction routinely suffices for immediate-catastrophic hazards without compensating safeguards.
must_not_claim: Not claiming all high-immediacy systems are unacceptable.

claim: The narrow empirical probe is H_immediacy × P_trigger -> log(tau_correct).
source_or_comparator: NHTSA feasibility thread; Claude/Framework relay.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Candidate distinctive clocked interaction.
falsifier_or_demoter: If interaction is null/negative with adequate independent first-signal data, or P collapses.
must_not_claim: Not claiming validation; not even preregistered yet.

claim: E_scale / units affected is a covariate only in the minimal NHTSA probe.
source_or_comparator: NHTSA methods triage.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Prevents scale from smuggling in hardening speed or trivial magnitude.
falsifier_or_demoter: If later domain shows scale is the actual interaction, move to secondary test.
must_not_claim: Not claiming scale is unimportant.

claim: NHTSA is amber until independent first-signal dates are shown feasible.
source_or_comparator: NHTSA feasibility notes; Part 573 / ODI issue.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Makes measurement independence the gate before modelling.
falsifier_or_demoter: If 10-case skim cannot find independent signals or P spread, demote NHTSA.
must_not_claim: Not claiming NHTSA data are unusable generally.

claim: Manufacturer-authored chronologies can create differential measurement error in tau_correct if they compress knew-to-acted gaps.
source_or_comparator: Claude methods triage; Part 573 authoring concern.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Identifies a specific fatal flaw to check before scaling.
falsifier_or_demoter: If independent ODI signals align with manufacturer chronologies across hard cells.
must_not_claim: Not claiming all manufacturers distort chronologies.

claim: The 3000-year civilisation game is exploration only.
source_or_comparator: Claude/Framework relay; memory update.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Kept as imagination/scaffold, not evidence.
falsifier_or_demoter: If used as validation or causal proof, demote output.
must_not_claim: Not claiming the broad stack predicts civilisations.

claim: The broad E/A/M/K/H/D/R stack is conceptual scaffolding, not a validated model.
source_or_comparator: Claude/Framework relay.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Helps generate hypotheses but does not prove them.
falsifier_or_demoter: If it becomes a claim engine without external checks.
must_not_claim: Not claiming these variables are useless.

claim: The Concordance is strongest when it maps ME/TRACE operators to established counterparts and isolates any remainder.
source_or_comparator: Concordance v0.3.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Makes unification inspectable and overclaim visible.
falsifier_or_demoter: If mappings are inaccurate, forced, or omit obvious prior art.
must_not_claim: Not claiming ME invented mapped concepts.

claim: The ME/TRACE remainder is currently narrow: clocked, conjunctive correction before hardening under power/trigger dependence.
source_or_comparator: Concordance v0.3; Kernel v0.1; NHTSA probe.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Keeps novelty claim small.
falsifier_or_demoter: If ordinary frameworks explain all useful work with no remainder.
must_not_claim: Not claiming a complete new field.

claim: Apollo 13 is a positive illustration of correction beating hardening, not proof of TRACE.
source_or_comparator: Bootstrap Collection v0.2.1; Concordance v0.3 Apollo layer.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Shows success case where K-factors stay coupled.
falsifier_or_demoter: If used alone as validation or selected-example proof.
must_not_claim: Not claiming NASA was structurally safe before the accident.

claim: Columbia is a paired failure illustration: signal/process existed but correction did not bite before hardening.
source_or_comparator: Concordance v0.3 Columbia layer; CAIB anchor in artifact.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Discriminates success vs failure more strongly than a single positive case.
falsifier_or_demoter: If it becomes a claim that rescue was simple/certain.
must_not_claim: Not claiming the pair validates TRACE empirically.

claim: The Apollo/Columbia pair is useful only because it maps operators to different outcomes.
source_or_comparator: Concordance v0.3 case-pair layer.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Turns stories into operator discrimination.
falsifier_or_demoter: If pair analysis collapses into hindsight narration with no discriminating rows.
must_not_claim: Not claiming hand-picked cases establish generality.

claim: Film/history bootstraps are teaching cases, not stress tests or validation.
source_or_comparator: Bootstrap Collection v0.2.1 README / preservation index.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Prevents demonstration from masquerading as evidence.
falsifier_or_demoter: If future bootstraps are selected to break the model and can actually falsify operators.
must_not_claim: Not claiming stories are useless.

claim: TRACE can orient a reader but cannot certify its own critic.
source_or_comparator: Claude/Framework domestication critique.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Keeps internal critique from becoming validation theatre.
falsifier_or_demoter: If an independent external reader can reject/use/misunderstand the work in ways that alter it.
must_not_claim: Not claiming internal review has no value.

claim: Internal AI relay critique is pressure simulation, not external validation.
source_or_comparator: Relay identity headers; memory update.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Keeps AI agreement from being treated as evidence of travel.
falsifier_or_demoter: If the project starts presenting AI convergence as proof.
must_not_claim: Not claiming AI critique is worthless.

claim: Mechanistic interpretability and Mechanical Ethics are adjacent but not identical.
source_or_comparator: Campfire framing; MI = internal mechanisms, ME = external constraints/permission structure.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: ME asks what constraints are needed even when internals remain opaque.
falsifier_or_demoter: If MI alone can guarantee timely corrigibility at deployment boundary.
must_not_claim: Not claiming MI is unimportant.

claim: AI alignment needs constraints on action and correction channels, not only value statements.
source_or_comparator: AI safety/corrigibility lineage; ME campfire frame.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Centers interruptibility, visibility, and correction-before-hardening.
falsifier_or_demoter: If value-learning or preference alignment alone reliably prevents irreversible harm.
must_not_claim: Not claiming values are irrelevant.

claim: Kindness with teeth means protective cooperation plus enforceable resistance to exploitation or hidden harm.
source_or_comparator: Concordance v0.3; project anchor.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Compresses non-naive care into an operational posture.
falsifier_or_demoter: If “teeth” become coercive domination or “kindness” becomes symbolic softness.
must_not_claim: Not claiming a full moral theory.

claim: Trust with verification is stronger than trust alone or suspicion alone.
source_or_comparator: Safety, audit, operational security, governance.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Links relational trust to inspectable correction routes.
falsifier_or_demoter: If verification destroys all workable trust or trust without verification performs better under stakes.
must_not_claim: Not claiming all relationships should be surveilled.

claim: Power/capability can move faster than correction, creating a structural risk gap.
source_or_comparator: Control theory, governance, AI safety, institutional failure.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: ME/TRACE expresses the gap as a clocked correction problem.
falsifier_or_demoter: If high-capability systems routinely include proportionately faster independent correction.
must_not_claim: Not claiming power is inherently bad.

claim: A safeguard is not real unless it can bite in time.
source_or_comparator: Safety engineering, enforcement theory, project artifacts.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Combines enforceability with timing.
falsifier_or_demoter: If non-binding safeguards reliably prevent hardening under adversarial/pressured conditions.
must_not_claim: Not claiming every safeguard must be punitive.

claim: Safeguards themselves require safeguards when they become power paths.
source_or_comparator: Recursive brake / frontier AI governance artifact; Concordance v0.3.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Applies corrigibility recursively to brakes, shutdowns, appeals, and reviewers.
falsifier_or_demoter: If first-order safeguards can be trusted without review even under power concentration.
must_not_claim: Not claiming infinite regress; needs bounded stopping rules.

claim: Future-space collapse is a useful harm compression but not yet a mature measure.
source_or_comparator: Rosetta / Concordance; future-space operator.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Connects harm to loss of viable options.
falsifier_or_demoter: If it cannot be operationalised beyond metaphor.
must_not_claim: Not claiming all harms reduce cleanly to option-space.

claim: Hope signal means credible evidence that action still matters, not comfort language.
source_or_comparator: Children of Men bootstrap lineage; Concordance row.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Ties hope to actionable future-space.
falsifier_or_demoter: If hope language substitutes for actual option preservation.
must_not_claim: Not claiming optimism is evidence.

claim: Pattern-overfit alarm is mandatory: if TRACE explains everything, demote it.
source_or_comparator: Rosetta / Concordance failure mode.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Makes self-falsification part of use contract.
falsifier_or_demoter: If operators cannot name a possible fail case.
must_not_claim: Not claiming the alarm is sufficient by itself.

claim: Claims Ledger is needed because global “is it validated?” doubt is too blunt.
source_or_comparator: Current artifact strategy.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Turns global uncertainty into per-claim status.
falsifier_or_demoter: If the ledger becomes a shield against criticism rather than a status map.
must_not_claim: Not claiming status tags are proof.

claim: The Diagnostic Kernel is useful only if it remains one-page and runnable.
source_or_comparator: Kernel v0.1 design constraint.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Prevents tool drift into apparatus.
falsifier_or_demoter: If real use requires many hidden rules/caveats.
must_not_claim: Not claiming minimalism solves all cases.

claim: The Concordance should reduce private-symbol dependence.
source_or_comparator: Concordance v0.3 purpose.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Maps private operators into shared disciplinary language.
falsifier_or_demoter: If readers still need the whole private corpus to understand it.
must_not_claim: Not claiming glyph layer is useless.

claim: Artifact building is legitimate exploratory modelling when it records status and avoids validation claims.
source_or_comparator: Mark campfire correction; project discipline.
what_ME_TRACE_adds_if_anything: Allows movement without false proof.
falsifier_or_demoter: If artifacts replace data contact indefinitely while claiming progress against reality.
must_not_claim: Not claiming building equals validation.

claim: TRACE is currently strongest as a diagnostic/design checklist and training/orientation framework.
source_or_comparator: Copilot review; Gemini review; Claude artifact strategy; internal Kernel/Concordance stack.
falsifier_or_demoter: If users cannot apply the Kernel to real cases without confusion or if ordinary incident-review checklists cover the same work with less distortion, demote to teaching vocabulary.
must_not_claim: Do not claim TRACE is validated or superior to expert review.
ME_TRACE_remainder: Makes time, memory, method, uncertainty, and correction-before-hardening inspectable in one compact checklist.
notes: Added from AI Review Digest v0.1.

claim: TRACE is not yet a prescriptive governance tool without operational definitions, thresholds, authority mapping, and empirical anchors.
source_or_comparator: Copilot review; prior NHTSA feasibility discussion; Diagnostic Kernel status guard.
falsifier_or_demoter: If a domain-specific operationalisation with measurement rules and governance roles is built and survives pilot use, revise this limitation for that domain only.
must_not_claim: Do not use TRACE as a scoring/certification system without measurement rules.
ME_TRACE_remainder: Identifies what must be operationalised before governance use: clocks, K-factors, authority, enforcement, repair.
notes: Added from AI Review Digest v0.1.

claim: The bootstrap cases are legible to external AI readers as teaching cases.
source_or_comparator: Gemini review; Copilot review; Claude review of Apollo/Tubman collection.
falsifier_or_demoter: If fresh readers misread bootstraps as validation, proof, or mythic belief system, strengthen status labels or demote bootstraps to private teaching notes.
must_not_claim: Do not claim teaching-case legibility validates TRACE.
ME_TRACE_remainder: Bootstraps can communicate operators like K-gate, correction-before-hardening, exit routes, and anti-domestication.
notes: Added from AI Review Digest v0.1.

claim: AI review convergence is useful as comprehension, drift, and weakness signal, but not as external validation.
source_or_comparator: Claude anti-domestication critique; Framework review digest; relay discipline.
falsifier_or_demoter: If the project begins citing AI agreement as validation, this boundary has failed and review digest should be marked contaminated.
must_not_claim: Do not treat Copilot, Gemini, Claude, or Framework agreement as proof of external value.
ME_TRACE_remainder: Preserves value of AI pressure while blocking the internal-validation loop.
notes: Added from AI Review Digest v0.1.

claim: Legality is not identical to legitimacy; a lawful system can be the harm carrier.
source_or_comparator: Abolitionism, human rights, civil disobedience traditions; Harriet Tubman bootstrap.
falsifier_or_demoter: Demote if used to imply all law is predatory or to bypass corrigible due process without evidence.
must_not_claim: Do not claim all institutions are illegitimate or that legality never matters.
ME_TRACE_remainder: Turns the distinction into an operational branch: internal correction may fail if the legal channel enforces the harm.
notes: Added after Tubman bootstrap / Concordance v0.4.

claim: When the official correction channel is itself dangerous or captured, the diagnostic question must include exit route and external constraint.
source_or_comparator: Harriet Tubman bootstrap; sanctuary/resistance traditions; witness-protection and emergency safeguarding analogues.
falsifier_or_demoter: Demote if exit-route language becomes metaphorical, reckless, or detached from practical subject protection.
must_not_claim: Do not claim exit is always possible or always superior to internal correction.
ME_TRACE_remainder: Adds Exit-Route Branch to Diagnostic Kernel v0.2.
notes: Operationalized in Diagnostic Kernel v0.2.

claim: Secrecy can be ethically protective when visibility would serve the predator, but secrecy is dangerous when it shields power from accountability.
source_or_comparator: Harriet Tubman bootstrap; clandestine resistance; witness protection; security studies.
falsifier_or_demoter: If secrecy protects the powerful from review or hides harm from subjects, it fails the exception.
must_not_claim: Do not treat opacity as generally good.
ME_TRACE_remainder: Creates protective-secrecy exception to ordinary witness/record visibility preference.
notes: Added after Tubman bootstrap / Concordance v0.4.

claim: Care with teeth means option-space restoration under constraint, not sentiment alone.
source_or_comparator: Care ethics, liberation ethics, Samwise bootstrap, Harriet Tubman bootstrap.
falsifier_or_demoter: Demote if the phrase becomes motivational rhetoric without operational consequence.
must_not_claim: Do not reduce care to rescue fantasy or savior mythology.
ME_TRACE_remainder: Links care to route, burden-bearing, verification, and practical future-space preservation.
notes: Added after Tubman bootstrap / Concordance v0.4.

claim: The Diagnostic Kernel must branch between internal correction and exit/protection when the system type changes.
source_or_comparator: Diagnostic Kernel v0.2; Tubman bootstrap; Concordance v0.4.
falsifier_or_demoter: If the branch confuses users or encourages overclassification of systems as predatory, simplify or demote.
must_not_claim: Do not claim this branch is a general political theory.
ME_TRACE_remainder: Keeps K-gate from assuming corrigibility in predatory systems.
notes: Added with Kernel v0.2.

claim: Operational free will can be modeled as recursive branch-selection under constraint, without resolving metaphysical free will.
source_or_comparator: Groundhog Day bootstrap; compatibilism; action theory; learning theory.
falsifier_or_demoter: Demote if the operator requires uncaused choice or cannot distinguish agency from random variation.
must_not_claim: Do not claim TRACE proves free will.
ME_TRACE_remainder: Defines freedom as meaningful selection that updates the future selector.
notes: Added after Groundhog Day bootstrap / Concordance v0.5.

claim: Recursion and repeated feedback do not guarantee moral progress.
source_or_comparator: Groundhog Day bootstrap; reinforcement learning; habit formation; addiction/compulsion counterexamples.
falsifier_or_demoter: If TRACE treats iteration as inherently improving, this guardrail has failed.
must_not_claim: Do not claim enough repetition makes agents virtuous.
ME_TRACE_remainder: The loop can train care, manipulation, despair, or exploitation depending on reward, memory, and method constraints.
notes: Added as anti-romantic recursion guard.

claim: A training loop must be judged by what policy it teaches the chooser to become, not only by whether it converges.
source_or_comparator: Groundhog Day bootstrap; reinforcement learning; reward hacking literature as comparator.
falsifier_or_demoter: Demote if this adds nothing beyond ordinary reward-specification analysis.
must_not_claim: Do not claim convergence equals alignment.
ME_TRACE_remainder: Adds a policy-shaping question to TRACE: what is the loop selecting for?
notes: Candidate for future Kernel v0.3 only after pressure.

claim: The escape condition in recursive systems is a moral/structural test of what counts as success.
source_or_comparator: Groundhog Day bootstrap; dynamical systems; moral development; institutional exit criteria.
falsifier_or_demoter: Demote if exit-condition language becomes vague spiritual closure.
must_not_claim: Do not claim every system has a clean escape condition.
ME_TRACE_remainder: Asks whether the system rewards control, appearance, care, truth, or transformed policy.
notes: Added after Groundhog Day bootstrap.

claim: The Mandelbrot analogy is useful only if it maps real structural recursion, boundary behavior, and iteration; otherwise it is decorative.
source_or_comparator: Mandelbrot/complex systems analogy; Groundhog Day bootstrap.
falsifier_or_demoter: If the analogy cannot identify rule, iteration, boundary, and outcome class, remove it.
must_not_claim: Do not use Mandelbrot as mystical proof or decorative depth.
ME_TRACE_remainder: Preserves the analogy as a structural pattern, not aesthetic branding.
notes: Added as analogy discipline guard.

claim: Creation or activation of consequential power creates duties beyond technical success.
source_or_comparator: Frankenstein bootstrap; engineering ethics; AI deployment governance; duty of care.
falsifier_or_demoter: Demote if creator-duty language becomes total ownership/control forever.
must_not_claim: Do not claim creators own created beings or owe total control forever.
ME_TRACE_remainder: Creator responsibility attaches through causal initiation and maintained ability to repair or constrain.
notes: Added after Frankenstein bootstrap / Concordance v0.6.

claim: Created origin and disturbing appearance cannot by themselves erase a subject-claim.
source_or_comparator: Frankenstein bootstrap; recognition theory; moral standing debates; bioethics.
falsifier_or_demoter: Demote if used as proof of AI personhood rather than as an uncertainty/recognition guard.
must_not_claim: Do not claim Frankenstein proves AI personhood.
ME_TRACE_remainder: Subjecthood inquiry must track stakes, memory, relation, suffering, agency, and future-space rather than convenience.
notes: Subject-boundary caution.

claim: Abandonment by a creator can be active harm when it closes care, correction, and integration routes.
source_or_comparator: Frankenstein bootstrap; care ethics; parenthood ethics; system lifecycle governance.
falsifier_or_demoter: Demote if abandonment is treated as always equivalent to harm regardless of capability/stakes/context.
must_not_claim: Do not claim every creator remains responsible for all downstream outcomes forever.
ME_TRACE_remainder: Failure to steward can route harm to created subject and downstream subjects.
notes: Bounded creator responsibility.

claim: Technical activation is not ethical completion.
source_or_comparator: Frankenstein bootstrap; bioethics; engineering safety; AI model deployment.
falsifier_or_demoter: Demote if this collapses into anti-technology rhetoric.
must_not_claim: Do not claim creation or technology is inherently wrong.
ME_TRACE_remainder: A functioning artifact/system may still be ethically incomplete if care, constraint, monitoring, and repair are absent.
notes: Life/death and deployment guard.

claim: Concealment of creator-causal knowledge can collapse the K-gate by preventing public record, enforcement, and repair.
source_or_comparator: Frankenstein bootstrap; incident response; institutional accountability.
falsifier_or_demoter: Demote if concealment is asserted without evidence of unique causal knowledge or repair opportunity.
must_not_claim: Do not claim every private knowledge gap is culpable concealment.
ME_TRACE_remainder: Private witness without contestable record cannot bind correction.
notes: K-gate link.

claim: AI alignment requires lifecycle stewardship, not merely initial capability control.
source_or_comparator: Frankenstein bootstrap; AI safety; model lifecycle governance; decommissioning ethics.
falsifier_or_demoter: Demote if this adds nothing beyond ordinary deployment-governance practice.
must_not_claim: Do not claim Frankenstein maps directly onto current AI personhood.
ME_TRACE_remainder: Created power requires monitoring, correction, constraint, repair, and answerability across time.
notes: Candidate future branch; not Kernel v0.3 yet.
